scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run start:frontend & npm run start:backend
scripts.nginx:install: sudo cp nginx/bogeygolf.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/bogeygolf && sudo ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/bogeygolf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/bogeygolf && sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
scripts.nginx:reload: sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
